ledger.def: DINOv2-small CLS token of each frame (224², ImageNet-normalized). Deterministic; the "interpretation" is the pretrained net, identical for every video.
all-MiniLM-L6-v2 sentence embedding of the hook script (or per-second text). Deterministic.
mean(normalized CLIP image, normalized CLIP text) in the shared CLIP space. Low-resolution by design (averages everything).
mean cosine distance to the 8 nearest hooks in the embedding. Pure geometry over the vectors above.
k-means (k=8) clusters of the embeddings + cosine distance to the assigned cluster centre. k is a chosen parameter.
mean cosine distance to hooks published within ±45 days. Window (45d) is a chosen parameter.
cosine(CLIP image, CLIP text) of the hook. A defined scalar — how aligned the visuals are with the words per CLIP. Model-dependent but reproducible.
MMR keyphrase: 1-3 word n-gram of the script maximizing cos(phrase, hook) − redundancy. Multi-word, centrality-scored — filters throwaway words by construction.
concepts k-means-clustered corpus-wide; combo rarity = mean 1/(co-occurrence+1) over the concept-cluster PAIRS in the hook. Pure counting.
OWLv2 open-vocabulary detection: an object phrase is a component iff localized with score>0.15, returning a box. Non-objects ("setting","area") get no box and are excluded. Quantitative (score+box).
mean pairwise cosine distance among the 5 per-frame DINOv2 vectors — how much the hook visually changes (cut intensity).
LLM-written per-frame prose (analysis.json). SUBJECTIVE — shown only as context, never fed into any score. Flagged orange in the panel.
